source.business_scenario: 复杂查询产生多层 Streaming 节点
source.redaction_notes: Synthetic Pagila schema; no real customer data

input.sql:
SELECT f.title, COUNT(r.rental_id) AS cnt
FROM film f
JOIN inventory i ON f.film_id = i.film_id
JOIN rental r ON i.inventory_id = r.inventory_id
JOIN payment p ON r.rental_id = p.rental_id
WHERE f.rating = 'PG'
GROUP BY f.title
ORDER BY cnt DESC
LIMIT 20
input.explain_output:
-- @id: Q54

-- @severity: warning
-- @scenario: 复杂查询产生多层 Streaming 节点
SELECT f.title, COUNT(r.rental_id) AS cnt
FROM film f
JOIN inventory i ON f.film_id = i.film_id
JOIN rental r ON i.inventory_id = r.inventory_id
JOIN payment p ON r.rental_id = p.rental_id
WHERE f.rating = 'PG'
GROUP BY f.title
ORDER BY cnt DESC
LIMIT 20;
